news.summary: Arlindo Chissale, a journalist and political activist in Mozambique, disappeared without a trace on January 7, 2025, in Cabo Delgado, a region in the grips of an Islamist insurrection. news.headline: Who is Didier Deschamps, the France coach aiming for a third World Cup title?
